Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Mercy]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 15''' — Mercy participates in the course by straddling a staff with a dragon's head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 15''' — Mercy is a member of the Akura clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — Mercy's palms and staff are coated in black goo that is her madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — He turned with horror, part of him expecting to see Bai Rou, but it was Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — Mercy uses black madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — Mercy has a Blood Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — Mercy uses a staff.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — Mercy stood below the door holding a staff in both hands to protect them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 17''' — Mercy uses a vast black web to intercept bloodspawn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 17''' — Mercy wields a dragon-headed staff.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 17''' — Mercy is a girl whose actions kept the bloodspawn out for a short time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 17''' — Mercy uses webs to hold back the bloodspawn on the stairs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 17''' — Mercy is a character who was worried about Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 17''' — Mercy is pushing Lindon deeper into a structure and expresses fear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — Mercy is present during the conversation between Lindon and Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — Mercy's mother is at a high level of power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — Mercy was watching Yerin and Lindon sit motionless and stare into space.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — Mercy uses a staff of smooth black with a dragon head that has violet eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — Mercy was on the beach behind Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — Mercy is an Akura girl who uses dark madra from her oil-gloved hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 6''' — Mercy is a Lowgold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Mercy's mother was a Monarch who fought with the Dreadgod.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 11''' — Mercy's staff has violet eyes that flare.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Mercy is an Akura girl.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Mercy has purple eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Mercy's staff is shaped like a bundle of flexible black tendons with a violet-eyed dragon's head on its end.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Mercy is struggling on the ground.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Mercy's arm becomes covered in violet crystalline armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Mercy's hair is mostly scorched off.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Mercy is cradling Suu.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Mercy's skin is red and burned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — Mercy carries many pills, elixirs, and sacred herbs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — Mercy has a bow that can take the form of a staff.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — Mercy has a weapon named Suu.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — Mercy has her advancement written out for her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — Mercy is addressed by Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — Mercy is a Lowgold power user who used shadow limbs to lift Lindon and Orthos.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 2''' — Mercy pilots the Skysworn cloudship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 2''' — Mercy flies by straddling her staff.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Mercy uses a dragon-headed bow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Mercy is a character in the story.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — Mercy is part of the group traveling with Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — Mercy attempted to speak up during the conversation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Mercy is wearing green Skysworn plate armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Mercy speaks in a soothing voice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Mercy uses a bow with a black arrow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Mercy used an arrow to defend Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 7''' — Mercy's coordination was sealed as a price for leaving home.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 7''' — Mercy possesses the Puppeteer's Iron body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 7''' — Mercy is related to Charity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Mercy is present and excited by Eithan's presentation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Mercy looked at Eithan askance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Mercy refuses to take a Heaven's Drop because she does not want to admit her faults and return to her family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Mercy was no longer present when Lindon looked up.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — Mercy leads Lindon to unclaimed natural treasure deposits.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — Mercy broke through to Highgold two weeks prior due to the surrounding shadow aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — Mercy can emanate the power of a Truegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — Mercy is a Truegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — Mercy's power can drop from Truegold to Highgold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — Mercy inherited the weapon Suu from her Monarch mother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Mercy's hair has grown long enough to cover her ears.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Mercy uses a void key to store items.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — Mercy was unhurt following the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 13''' — Mercy is an exile from the Akura family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 13''' — Mercy is the grand-niece of Akura Charity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — Mercy wears a smooth purple breastplate over black-and-white sacred artist's robes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — Mercy's sense for Forging is good, but her shadow madra is not widely compatible.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — Mercy has a Goldsign on her fingers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — Mercy is a Skysworn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — Mercy stood with Lindon and Yerin wearing Skysworn armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — Mercy was to serve as the native guide on the expedition.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — Mercy wears black gloves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Mercy is the daughter of Akura Malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Mercy's sacred arts were previously sealed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Mercy possesses the Divine Treasure.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Mercy's Divine Treasure is a massive book of Forged madra containing the power of her Path.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Mercy has a soul oath with Akura Malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Mercy's mastery of the Shadow’s Edge was returned to her by Akura Malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Mercy's Nightworm Venom was returned to her by Akura Malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Mercy's spirit is at the peak of Truegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Mercy is expected to advance to the Underlady rank.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Mercy is forbidden from returning to the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Mercy will lead a team in the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Mercy is the niece of Aunt Charity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Mercy was fighting the second prince.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Mercy felt Lindon advancing to Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Mercy has advanced to Underlady.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Mercy's advancement to Underlady is stable.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Mercy was always a Truegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Mercy left home because she did not want to be a Lady.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Mercy uses a veil from her mother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Mercy rolls Suu between her hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Mercy pointed to a silver-and-purple owl on the ceiling.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — Mercy is gone.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — Mercy is the daughter of the Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — Mercy possesses Eclipse, the Ancient Bow of the Soulseeker.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — Mercy possesses the Book of Eternal Night.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — Mercy is the sister of Pride.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Mercy is a preferred candidate for the Uncrowned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Mercy is a Copper who earned a perfect score on the training program within three days.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Mercy achieved her Copper advancement a few hours before Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 6''' — Akura Pride is Mercy's brother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 7''' — Mercy is located on the sixth island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — Mercy uses a staff of twisted black madra called Suu.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon's room is connected to Mercy's room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — A wisp of Mercy's hair was blowing in the wind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 11''' — Mercy uses Striker techniques to destroy or seal enemy sacred artists.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — Mercy uses Striker techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — Mercy has a Dream of Darkness technique and bloodline armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — Mercy is ranked eighth in the tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — Mercy's voice can echo in Lindon's mind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 13''' — Mercy is an entity that accompanies Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 13''' — Mercy was tending to Naru Saeya.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Mercy watched the fight with excitement in her eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Mercy can conjure an arrow for defense.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Mercy uses Strings of Shadow to bind enemies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Mercy uses shadow-venom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Mercy hid in Yerin's tree.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Mercy is a competitor Lindon can see everything she has to offer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Mercy wears an Akura uniform.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 21''' — Mercy was coming in to cheer Lindon up.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Mercy's room connects to Lindon's and Pride's rooms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Mercy wears black-and-white robes instead of Akura faction costumes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Mercy was concerned and whispering with Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Mercy is a competitor in the tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Mercy's goal is to defeat Sophara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Mercy is watching the Uncrowned matches with Lindon and Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Mercy's signature would look the same as Eithan's due to Akura Malice's shadow madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Charity floated behind Mercy during the Uncrowned ceremony.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Mercy gathered with Yerin and Eithan at the end of the cloudship dock.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Mercy is a character who left the scene.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — One of Mercy's tricks helped Lindon figure out his Underlord revelation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Mercy trained on the Phantom Islands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Mercy has a brother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Mercy cannot afford distractions until she reaches the peak of Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Charity intends to relay Lindon's greetings to Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Mercy was transported to the tunnels beneath the stadium by Aunt Charity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Mercy uses the Dark Tide Incantation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Mercy is an Underlady.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Mercy possesses Overlord-level madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Mercy uses the Nightworm Venom technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Mercy uses the Shadow’s Edge technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Mercy uses the Strings of Shadow technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Mercy uses soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Mercy uses bloodline armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Mercy has a temporary advancement to Overlady.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Mercy uses the Moon’s Eye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Mercy fought three fights.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Charity and Fury are being considerate of Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Mercy is present during the post-battle conversation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Mercy believed Lindon could win.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Mercy is present in the waiting room and cheers for Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Mercy felt nervous because Aunt Charity could not transport them to Sky's Edge on her own.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Mercy reacted to a projection of Lindon's face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — Mercy used a bow to fire a volley of violet arrows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — Mercy rides Suu and carries healing salve or pills.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Mercy is in a dangerous situation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — Mercy is someone Malice would sacrifice for her family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — Mercy is a character who can relay requests to Fury.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — Mercy is present with Lindon and Fury.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Mercy was at Lindon's bedside when he woke up.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Mercy agreed that Lindon did the right thing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Mercy fought Sophara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Sophara had previously used Azure Moon Reigns against Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Mercy is a character mentioned in relation to Malice's plans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Mercy and Pride were arguing near the evacuation portal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Mercy is part of Lindon's team.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Lindon can feel Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Mercy was fully armored and released a volley of violet arrows from her Archlord bow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Mercy's eyes were wild and panicked, filled with grief.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Mercy was ambushed by the Sage of Red Faith, with Calan Archer, Yan Shoumei, Brother Aekin, and three Overlords of Redmoon Hall, sent by Reigan Shen, who came to kill her and her brother Pride.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Sophara attempted to assassinate Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — When Mercy demanded something in the Akura clan, it got done.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — Mercy asked not to be disturbed while caring for her brother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — Mercy is present with Charity and Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 3''' — Mercy is associated with the Akura family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 3''' — Mercy is the daughter of Uncle Fury and a Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 3''' — Mercy is the half-sister of Akura Fury.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Mercy is a member of a family that Lindon questions her about.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Mercy has the power of an Overlady.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Mercy uses a technique that can uproot grass and soil.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Mercy was staring at Samara's ring.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Mercy is a character who exclaims they will take care of Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Mercy moved to cover Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 8''' — Mercy's clan provided power to Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 8''' — Mercy was sitting with Yerin and Orthos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — Mercy is visiting other clans in person to assist with the evacuation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — Mercy uses a communication construct.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — Mercy is too far away to escape in time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon is unsure of Mercy's status.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 16''' — Mercy flew in unharmed while bobbing on her staff.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 16''' — Mercy buried an object in the ground.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 16''' — The object Mercy buried felt like a scripted tool.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Mercy is a person Ziel could potentially reach to escape.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Mercy laid a hand on Lindon's shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Mercy provided an endorsement for Lindon's family in Moongrave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Mercy possesses a void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — In some possible futures, Lindon marries Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Mercy tosses Lindon a scripted stone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Mercy stumbled out of a spatial crack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Mercy herded a crowd of Irons to the south.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Mercy intends to put Jai Chen in charge and return to Sacred Valley when time unfroze.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 20''' — Mercy wears armor that was shattered by the Dreadgod.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Mercy told the sacred artists to listen to Jai Chen.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Mercy is recovering.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Mercy suffered significant spiritual injuries after the Wandering Titan shattered her bloodline armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Mercy's madra channels are connected to her Book of Eternal Night in a unique way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Mercy forged her own bow and arrows out of Strings of Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Mercy's advancement was unstable.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Mercy's consciousness was tied to the fifth page of her Book during her unstable advancement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Mercy's mother is a decree-maker for the Akura clan territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Mercy's Aunt Charity is a Heart Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Mercy will return to her mother when called.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 9''' — Mercy is in the northwest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Mercy stated they do not have time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Mercy is part of the group exploring the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — Mercy urged the group to move.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — Mercy used Strings of Shadow to pull herself up.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — Mercy is concerned about the speed of their progress.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — Mercy released a barrage of arrows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Mercy looked like a rat that had been partially drowned in mud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Mercy made a green-and-black barrier with Ziel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Eithan orders Mercy to use the Dream of Darkness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — Mercy has once felt like an Overlady.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — Mercy uses amethyst bolts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — Mercy uses soulfire-enhanced Strings of Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — Mercy focused attacks on Reigan Shen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — Mercy called up her bloodline armor as she fell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Mercy was using a healing construct on her neck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Mercy is contained inside a cocoon of Strings of Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon and his companions want to help Mercy advance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin picked up Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 18''' — Mercy's madra reserves were low and her channels were strained from the destruction of her bloodline armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 18''' — Mercy is a peak Underlady who is acclimated to Overlord-level madra and soulfire due to her Book.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Mercy cycled in the hallway.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Mercy owns the bow Suu.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — Mercy uses armor to cover her limbs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Mercy escaped for the same reason Lindon was forced to leave Orthos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — Mercy was holding Orthos and Little Blue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Mercy went missing from the group.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 27''' — Mercy was trembling at Malice's feet.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Mercy is currently in Moongrave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Mercy helped Lindon with her Overlord revelation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Mercy possesses a Book.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — Mercy is one of the six beings threatened by the Silent King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — The Dreadgod mentioned Mercy by name.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Mercy was forbidden by her mother to join Lindon and Dross.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Mercy has fought the Wandering Titan before.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Mercy pushed her bloodline armor to the limit during her fight with the Wandering Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — Mercy is a representative of her family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — Akura Mercy is an Akura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — Mercy has an office at the top of a tower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — Mercy knows where the plans are.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 12''' — Mercy accessed restricted records in the library.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 12''' — Mercy's Path is something she walks one step at a time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Mercy informed Lindon that Moongrave's defense has multiple layers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Mercy was waiting in a short tower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 16''' — Mercy looked up to Lindon in concern.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Mercy uses amethyst armor and black webs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Dross mentioned Mercy is nice to everybody.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Mercy is a character who was stationed in a tower during the Silent King's attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Mercy sent a message that appeared as an image.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — Mercy's family received messages from Everwood through every channel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Mercy is not an Archlady, Herald, or Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon picked Mercy up.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 24''' — Malice is attempting to transport Mercy away.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Mercy has severe structural damage to her madra channels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Mercy's mother was fought by Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Mercy's connection to the Book of Eternal Night improved after forcing open its seventh page.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Mercy has a training room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Mercy is emerging from the tunnels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Mercy trained in the fifth page of the Book of Eternal Night.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Mercy threw a pebble at Lindon's head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon is concerned that Mercy may only be following him because he and Yerin want her to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 5''' — Mercy is an archer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Mercy is approaching the peak of Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Mercy fought her mother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — Mercy and Lindon project their minds and spirits into the pages of the Book of Eternal Night.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Malice treated Mercy poorly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Mercy will be pleased.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Mercy has a shadow cycling room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Mercy has set herself up in a corner of the island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Mercy is a character who drinks elixir through a straw.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Mercy was on the verge of a breakthrough to Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Mercy's mother left some of her authority in Mercy's Book.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Mercy sat in the center of a six-sided room with black-tinged mirror walls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Mercy is a newly advanced Archlady.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Mercy's Overlord revelation is to bring light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Mercy has a body thrice reforged in soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Mercy has advanced to Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Mercy can be shrouded in armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Mercy called out in agreement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — Mercy is an Archlady.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — Mercy uses a Shadestep technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — Mercy uses Puppeteer Iron Body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — Mercy possesses Suu.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — Mercy uses wind aura and Strings of Shadow to propel herself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — Mercy is a student of Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — Mercy leans on Suu in its staff form.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — Mercy had left Lindon's group a week prior.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Mercy is tapped out.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Mercy possesses the authority of the Ashwind queen’s heir.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Mercy's mother was a Sage for many years before advancing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Mercy consumes a recovery elixir.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Mercy is on her way to the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Mercy is battling through a hostile storm and lightning-dragons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Mercy used a technique to fade into the shadows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Mercy wore amethyst armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Mercy used Strings of Shadow to try and lash herself to the ground.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Mercy follows Ziel as he launches toward the Weeping Dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Mercy holds the Silent King Bow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Mercy is someone Ziel was protecting from the Weeping Dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Akura Malice's shadows crept up to Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Mercy's body slid inside Akura Malice's shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon sat Mercy onto the ground after pulling her from Malice's shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Mercy suffered a cut to the side of her eye from flying debris.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Mercy's soulfire was depleted.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Mercy was unconscious and wrestling mentally and spiritually.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — The Bow of the Silent King was made for Mercy to grow into.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Mercy sat with haunted shadows behind her eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Mercy is working on the Book of Eternal Night a few floors down.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 25''' — Mercy's Archlord revelation was 'To bring light.'}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 25''' — Mercy instructed Dross to contact Yerin and Ziel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Mercy has absorbed enough of her mother's power to be stronger than she should be.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Mercy's body, spirit, and mind are suited for advancement due to her Book.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Breaking down the pages of her Book can get Mercy to Herald if she can digest it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Mercy is preparing to advance to Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Mercy has hair that floats like a gas or as if drifting through water.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Mercy is a Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Mercy's hair consists of wisps of living shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Mercy's bloodline armor blocked Malice's first attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Mercy caught Malice's blade in one gauntlet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Mercy struggled to defeat a shadow sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Malice launches an arrow at Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — Mercy is a living sacred artist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — Mercy remembers Malice punishing her in front of the entire clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — Mercy is a character found by Emriss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — Mercy has been using a bow since she was half a foot tall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — Mercy is hung up on her mother's death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Mercy is mentioned in comparison to Ziel's advancement smoothness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Mercy is the size of a tower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Mercy uses a black-and-white striped bow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Mercy has a white halo and a violet flower blooming over her head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Mercy's arrow is a black star that falls from the sky.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Mercy's arrows carry heavy shadows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 31''' — Mercy asked if they should go into the portal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 31''' — Mercy asks if Eithan's wink means he has good news.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 34''' — Mercy is a character who sits in the giant's castle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 34''' — Mercy annihilated the Soldier using shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 37''' — Mercy reunited with Lindon upon his arrival.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 37''' — Mercy is able to use a restoration ability.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Mercy is a member of the Reaper Division.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Mercy wears black armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Mercy can unleash bloodline armor that manifests as a purple crystalline fist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Mercy's mother designed a Path that was the ultimate expression of Akura Malice's will.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Mercy uses a bow called Shattersight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Mercy has ascended to the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Mercy is a Reaper.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Mercy uses Shattersight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Mercy can use Strings of Shadow to create a city-sized web.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Mercy is an Archlord who possesses a Remnant and can hear the song of her Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Mercy's powers are not dependent on the presence of the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — Mercy is part of the Reaper Division.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — Mercy gave Pride a metal communication device.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Mercy was covered in greenish blood from a split worm in the Void.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Mercy brought a mountain filled with veins of living metals.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Mercy insisted that the newborn world must be named.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
